summary: Clear, deep recording captures a superb first set while the second set feels less energetic.
review: The reviewers praise this tape for its beautiful, crystal‑clear and well‑balanced sound, describing it as an excellent capture of the concert. Musically the first set is highlighted as superb, though the second set is noted to be noticeably lower in energy. Overall the show is considered very good even if not the peak of the run.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review rates the show 4 stars and highlights excellent recording quality; weighting musical performance (70%) and sound quality (30%) yields a ~4.3 rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clear, deep and balanced audio with no reported issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as superb; second set noted as noticeably less energetic.
